states.name: Siegfried
states.title: Dragonslayer of Legends
states.description: Siegfried, once hailed as the legendary dragonslayer. After a fierce battle with the calamitous dark dragon known as the "Winged Demon," she succeeded in sealing it away. However, the wounds she sustained in that battle ultimately forced her to retire from life as a swordswoman.

states.name: Siegfried
states.title: Dragonslayer of Legends
states.description: After retiring, Siegfried settled down in a quiet countryside with the dark dragon, now in the form of a young girl. Having earned a fortune from defeating the dragon, she had no intention of ever working again. Instead, she spends her days drinking, fishing and gambling while looking after the spoiled little dragon.

states.name: Siegfried
states.title: Dragonslayer of Legends
states.description: Before long, Siegfried had come to feel a motherly affection toward Bahamut. Her decision to live in seclusion was a way to keep the girl away from people and war. Once she becomes certain there is no longer any threat of Bahamut running wild, she plans to remove the collar and set her free.
